feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)

entry.title: I Won't Ask Again
entry.summary:
Author: Butterfly_Wordsmith

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,943Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Hal and Barry break into Batman's room on the Watchtower with the intention of fucking nasty. Unfortunately, they have to immediately take refuge in the closet when they hear Bruce and Clark coming. What follows is a highly emotional Bruce letting Clark take care of him with his dick while Hal and Barry watch from the closet.

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,373Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father.

entry.title: Behind Our Masks
entry.summary:
Author: WriteMeLikeDia

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 99,257Chapters: 14/20Kudos: 31

Summary: Clark Kent is sent to Gotham, tasked with uncovering Bruce Wayne's secret identity as Batman. At first, the banter and tease doesn't take them far, until the two eventually fall into a very complicated relationship.—————By their third shots, Clark feels bold enough to ask, “What about you? Any romantic history?” Bruce doesn’t hesitate to answer with a straight, “No.” “No as in… nothing?” “Never been with a woman,” Bruce says, then adds, “or a man.” Or a man. Clark tries to play a neutral reaction, yet his voice can’t help but come out a little too intrigued as he whispers, “Oh.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Bruce Wayne In Drag
entry.summary:
Author: NightTwink73

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,952Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 160

Summary: Heavily inspired by the song "Andrew in Drag", this fic follows Clark as he falls for who he thinks is a beautiful woman, only to find out that it's actually Bruce in drag. Now he has to figure out what to do about it.

entry.title: This wasn't covered in the birds and bees talk
entry.summary:
Author: Star_Chaser_1701

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,238Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 13

Summary: One afternoon when he was fourteen Alfred sat him down for a very awkward conversation about the magazine that was stuffed under his pillow. In retrospect he should have hid it better. But life is full of times when you look back and realize if you’d just done something slightly different you wouldn’t be in the position you are now.

entry.title: It’s brutal out here!
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,664Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 177

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. Mine was just a little more . . . intense than others. I was more rebellious than troublesome, honestly.” Or Clark gets de-aged to seventeen a.k.a when he had his punk rock phase, and everyone is forced to bare witness

entry.title: The Moon and his Sun
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,703Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 9

Summary: As the only heir to the kingdom of Gotham, Bruce Wayne is bound by duty to marry someone that he doesn't love: the daughter of the Demon's head, Talia al Ghul. He knows, more than anything, that he is expected to do this for the good of his people. Despite this, his eyes keep drifting toward his silent sentinel of a knight, Clark Kent, drawn in hopelessly by his otherworldly blue eyes and his own carnal desires. Torn between dark desire and a duty to his nation, Bruce has a difficult choice to make.

entry.title: Joyride
entry.summary:
Author: TheCrimsonCritic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,770Chapters: 9/10Kudos: 117

Summary: "As if the man could sense Bruce’s ogling, Clark looked directly at him as the bull jerked particularly hard, sending the reporter’s back into a sinuous arch. Bruce was a man who had a turbulent “relationship” with Clark, but he was still just a man. A man who wanted the reporter-turned-mechanical-bull rider. Bad." OR Bruce sees Clark ride a mechanical bull at a themed gala wants Clark's cookie BAD. Before AND after discovering Clark's identity as Superman.

entry.title: in a land of make believe (that don't believe in me)
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,855Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 559

Summary: The kid blinks, then goes rigid. He slowly turns, and Clark– Clark’s stomach drops. Because he knows those eyes. He’s seen those eyes every day for the past nearly seven months. Those bright blue eyes that are an exact copy of his own. “... Conner?” He hears himself say. “Shit,” The kid– Conner– swears. “Dad’s gonna kill me.”------------------------An encounter with time-traveling robots brings a sixteen-year-old Conner to the present day. Clark and Bruce, predictably, are completely out of their depth.

entry.title: Main Event
entry.summary:
Author: prettiestbatattheball

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,270Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: "Bloody hell" Constantine, saw the same thing Batman saw. An absolute drugged up BANE, that definitely wouldn't be able to pull his punches and ensure a safe fight. "Yeah, no. I call a safety stop. I can't let you fight in that condition. I don’t know what you injected, but there is a zero-drug policy, including anything enhancing" Before Constantine could actually announce that to the ring commentators or on ring staff, Batman pulled the cape from his shoulders and let it fall outside of the ring. With precision he tightened his gloves, eyes never leaving BANE. "You won't."   Constantine stared at him for a second, the crowd began to mutter amongst them, Batman could feel the uncertainty and anger radiate from them in waves. “They paid. They get a fight.” “B, this is insane! Look at him! He’ll break you if he won’t k...” “Enough. Start the match.” Constantine sneered, but there was nothing he could do. With an angry wave, he signaled the bell ringer. - Or Bruce Wayne becomes THE wrestler Batman, adopts a bunch of children, falls in love and tries to navigate all of that while also try to learn to be himself again. Whatever that means

entry.title: Forever and evermore (For Eternity)
entry.summary:
Author: starfishingbythehill

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,521Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 20

Summary: “Come on Clark, it isn’t even that scary!” Clark’s face reminds him of the statue in his mother’s garden, the one over the fountain. The scrunched nose, the distant eyes, the thin lips. Displeasure and acceptance both. He really doesn’t understand what’s wrong. “We climb higher in the barn.” “It isn’t the same thing !” Clark denies. “I can’t do it Bruce, I’m not allowed to. It would make Ma sad.” “You’re such a wuss.” Bruce rolls his eyes and jumps down the tree. Clark pouts, crossing his arms in front of himself. Bruce rolls his eyes harder. Clark never breaks the rules and he never seems happy about it. Anyway, he won’t even stay mad for long, they’re best friends so it’s okay. “Let’s go see the horses. Tommy is teaching me how to ride.” Clark smiles at him then. See? What did he say, it’s okay. They can’t stay mad at each other for long because they can’t stay away from each other for long. They are best friends after all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent & Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent & Martha Kent
  • Oliver Queen
  • Lois Lane
  • Diana (Wonder Woman)
  • Dinah Lance
  • Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)
  • Barry Allen

entry.title: My neighbor the Kryptonian (not clickbait)
entry.summary:
Author: El_kun

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,302Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 211

Summary: Peter Parker's new upstairs neighbor is too nice, too tall, and keeps leaving first-aid kits by his door like he knows something. Clark Kent's downstairs neighbor is too skinny, too tired, and keeps coming home bleeding through his hoodie like he thinks no one notices. It takes a broken rib, a bent skillet, and one very awkward conversation for them to realize they're both dorks and nerds.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Fruits of Our Labor
entry.summary:
Author: acatcam

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,970Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 712

Summary: Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne have been dating for a year - quietly, carefully, and very much in love. In public, they’re professional colleagues; in private, Bruce teases and Clark blushes his way through domestic bliss. Meeting the four Wayne sons was nerve-wracking enough, but now Bruce has been acting… off.A “stomach bug,” Clark insists.A “mystery,” Bruce argues.Neither of them expect the doctor’s results that leave Bruce speechless and Clark ugly crying with joy. Or: a fic about fatherhood, family dinners, a overprotective farmboy, and the world’s most unexpected pregnancy

entry.title: Morbid Curiosity
entry.summary:
Author: Charlie_bear_23

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,840Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 73

Summary: Bruce Wayne has always has always been a very good person, it's what makes him such a good detective.But, that morbid curiosity has put him in a difficult position... because when it's Superman's, your friend and colleagues, dick you're curious about it can make things interesting.
